microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **security program validation** framework from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing controls and workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise clients.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by **30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable compliance-ready model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation security posture standard.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test aligned to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with strict security and compliance requirements.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured security program planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — translating complex technical controls into scalable operational implementations.

Partnered with engineering teams to surface client-driven security control gaps, providing structured feedback that shaped platform integrations across AWS, Azure, and Kubernetes-hosted environments for enterprise compliance programs.

Liaised between engineering, operations, and enterprise stakeholders to align security program implementations with auditor expectations, mapping technical and administrative controls to NIST and SOC 2 framework requirements.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven security workflows**, conducting demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** on compliance-adjacent documentation tasks.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical control-mapping gaps and translating security concepts into actionable feature requirements.

Strengthened **security program data integrity** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, reducing compliance artifact lookup time by 83% across internal teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams with varied security and compliance dependencies.

Built a product strategy to reduce operational risk during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and roadmapping automation of critical compliance control paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil and security control gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact automation investments and improve program-wide compliance posture visibility.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping security dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering on phased rollout controls.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority security and stability tickets** and establish a repeatable developer intake process aligned to compliance goals.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% while maintaining security control integrity across all environments.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved operational consistency and client-facing accountability.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to align messaging with client security posture needs.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks through data-driven recommendations that informed program-wide operational controls.
